metadata.title: Rocket Security — Your Security, Our Passion
metadata.description: Rocket Security is a private security and guarding company based in Bamako, Mali. Private security, event security, remote surveillance, cash transport and more.

hero.subtitle: Professional security solutions for the protection of your assets, events, and people.

services.title: Our Services
services.section_description: From private security to high-tech surveillance, we provide full-spectrum protection services designed to safeguard what matters most to you.
services.subtitle: Comprehensive security solutions tailored to your needs
services.request_quote: Request a quote for this service

private_security.name: Private Security
private_security.short: Professional protection of your premises and assets with qualified and trained agents.
private_security.description: Our private security service offers you tailor-made protection for your commercial, industrial, and residential premises. Our agents are rigorously selected, trained, and equipped to ensure a deterrent presence and rapid intervention when needed.

event_security.name: Event Security
event_security.short: Complete security for your events: concerts, conferences, weddings, and gatherings.
event_security.description: We provide security for all types of events, from corporate conferences to large public gatherings. Our team plans and implements a security system adapted to the nature and scale of your event.

guarding.name: Guarding
guarding.short: Permanent monitoring of your sites with dedicated agents, day and night.
guarding.description: Our guarding service ensures continuous surveillance of your facilities. Our guards are trained to control access, monitor installations, and respond effectively to any abnormal situation.

patrols.name: Patrols & Interventions
patrols.short: Regular patrols and rapid interventions for the security of your sites.
patrols.description: Our mobile teams carry out regular surveillance patrols on your sites and respond quickly in case of alert. This service is ideal for companies with multiple sites or requiring mobile surveillance.

remote_surveillance.name: Remote Surveillance
remote_surveillance.short: Remote monitoring of your premises using cutting-edge technology.
remote_surveillance.description: Our remote surveillance center monitors your facilities in real-time through a network of cameras and sensors. In case of intrusion or anomaly, our operators immediately trigger intervention procedures.

k9_mobile.name: Mobile Security / K-9 Units
k9_mobile.short: Mobile units and K-9 handlers for enhanced and deterrent security.
k9_mobile.description: Our K-9 teams combine the effectiveness of trained dogs with the expertise of professional handlers. This solution offers a superior level of security, particularly suited to large sites, warehouses, and industrial zones.

cash_transport.name: Cash Transport
cash_transport.short: Secure transport of your valuables and funds with armored vehicles.
cash_transport.description: Our cash transport service guarantees the secure transport of your valuables. With armored vehicles, trained teams, and strict protocols, we ensure the protection of your financial assets from collection to delivery point.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A trusted security company serving Mali
about.story_text: Rocket Security is a private security company based in Bamako, Mali. Founded with the vision of providing top-tier security services, we have grown to become a major player in private security in Mali. Our commitment to excellence and our passion for protection set us apart in the industry.
about.mission_text: To protect people, property, and events with professionalism, integrity, and dedication. We are committed to providing tailored and effective security solutions to each of our clients.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.text: We act with honesty and transparency in all our missions.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.text: We strive for excellence in every service we provide.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.text: Our clients can count on us 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.text: Our agents are trained to the highest standards of the profession.

stats.label: Our Impact
stats.heading: Numbers That Speak
stats.description: Over a decade of dedicated service protecting people, businesses, and assets across Mali.

team_showcase.label: Our Team
team_showcase.heading: Professionals dedicated to your protection
team_showcase.description: Our strength lies in our agents: rigorously selected, trained to the highest standards, and equipped to handle any situation. Every member of Rocket Security embodies our commitment to excellence.
team_showcase.trained: Agents trained and certified to international standards

trust.title: They Trust Us
trust.subtitle: Leading companies and institutions entrust us with their security

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: What clients often ask us
faq.description: A few quick answers to help you understand how we work before requesting a quote.

coverage.question: Do you only operate in Bamako?
coverage.answer: Rocket Security operates in Bamako and can organize security coverage in other regions of Mali depending on the mission, duration, and operational needs.

quote.question: How do I get a quote?
quote.answer: You can contact us by phone, email, or through the website form. We assess the site type, schedule, risks, and number of agents needed before proposing a solution.

availability.question: Are services available 24/7?
availability.answer: Yes. Guarding, surveillance, patrols, and interventions can be organized day and night, including weekends and holidays.

events.question: Do you secure one-time events?
events.answer: Yes. We can handle access control, crowd flow, sensitive area monitoring, and coordination with event managers.

reports.question: Do we receive follow-up after the mission?
reports.answer: Depending on the planned setup, our teams can provide reports, logbooks, and incident updates so you maintain clear visibility on the mission.

recruitment.question: How can I apply to Rocket Security?
recruitment.answer: Candidates can use the Careers page to send their information and resume. Profiles are reviewed according to operational needs and selection criteria.

operations.label: Sectors served
operations.heading: Security plans adapted to real field conditions
operations.description: We secure sensitive sites, companies, events, and mobile operations with a structured, supervised, and responsive approach.
operations.team_note: Every mission is supported by supervision teams and clearly identified agents.
operations.method_heading: A clear mission, from assessment to follow-up

audit.title: Risk assessment
audit.text: We evaluate the site, access points, sensitive hours, and protection priorities.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.text: We put the right agents, equipment, and operational instructions in place.

supervision.title: Supervision
supervision.text: Teams stay coordinated through radio, patrols, controls, and alert escalation.

reporting.title: Client follow-up
reporting.text: You receive clear reports so you keep visibility on the mission.

cta.label: Take Action
cta.title: Protect your business today
cta.subtitle: Contact us for a free assessment of your security needs

training.title: Ongoing training
training.text: Benefit from regular training programs to develop your skills.

career.title: Career growth
career.text: Advancement opportunities within a fast-growing company.

equipment.title: Professional equipment
equipment.text: Work with quality equipment and professional uniforms.

team.title: Team spirit
team.text: Join a close-knit and dynamic team dedicated to security.

agent.title: Security Agent
agent.text: Surveillance and protection of client sites

supervisor.title: Team Leader
supervisor.text: Coordination and supervision of security operations

k9_handler.title: K-9 Handler
k9_handler.text: Patrols and security with canine unit
